subcodes.first_line: Convey unto his honor Dhabih, upon whom be the Glory of God, boundless greetings. Strange it is that no word hath been received from him [3.5s]... ...In some of the revealed prayers and supplications it is written, “and make him.”  Is it considered interpolation if one recites, in a passsage of entreaty, "and make me"
subcodes.first_line_orig: بجناب ذبیح علیه بهاء الله تکبیر مالانهایه برسانید عجبست که خبر ایشان نرسید
subcodes.subjects: @empty learning; false spirituality, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @unity; oneness of humanity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
